svg.text: Six-Layer Architecture v36.2 — Control Plane First
Image Flow: Gateway stores jpg → Proxy detects <media:image> → base64 inject → Adapter routes to Qwen2.5-VL → image understanding
Output: ~/.kb/ (sources + text_index + mm_index + daily_digest) + WhatsApp + Discord push + SSD backup
every 4h: check all job status files
All alerts -> WhatsApp + Discord dual-channel push (via notify.sh)
tests / registry / syntax / deploy / env / health / security
用户专业深度 + Claude Code 设计部署 + OpenClaw 数据复利 = 有生命的闭环系统
